analysis.reasoning: The tweet reports the EU chairing the Foreign Affairs Council and highlights agenda items (Sahel, climate diplomacy, MEPP, Libya, Venezuela, Bolivia), signaling active EU leadership in foreign policy and climate initiatives. This aligns with EU4 (avant-garde political actor) due to showcasing the EU as a proactive regulator/leader on climate diplomacy and international issues, and with EU6 (contributes to a better world) by illustrating EU engagement in peace, multilateralism, and cooperation across regions.
